<noinclude>
This is the data entry form for '''Census Record''' pages.

See [[Project:Census Data Guide]] for instructions on how to transcribe census data.
</noinclude><includeonly>
{{{info|create title=Create a Census Record|edit title=Edit Census Record}}}

{{{for template|CensusRecord}}}

{| class="formtable"
! Census Year:
| {{{field|Census Year|input type=dropdown|mandatory|values=1850,1852,1860,1870,1880,1900,1910,1920,1930,1940,1950}}}
|-
! Enumeration District:
| {{{field|Enumeration District|input type=text|size=10}}}
|-
! Page Number:
| {{{field|Page Number|input type=text|size=6}}}
|-
! Line Number:
| {{{field|Line Number|input type=text|size=6}}}
|-
! Dwelling Number:
| {{{field|Dwelling Number|input type=text|size=6}}}
|-
! Family Number:
| {{{field|Family Number|input type=text|size=6}}}
|-
! Address (as recorded in census):
| {{{field|Census Address|input type=text|size=40|placeholder=Address exactly as written in census}}}
|-
! Modern Address (if known):
| {{{field|Modern Address|input type=combobox|values from category=Properties}}}
|-
! Head of Household:
| {{{field|Head of Household|input type=combobox|values from category=People}}}
|-
! Number of Household Members:
| {{{field|Household Members|input type=text|size=4}}}
|-
! Source URL:
| {{{field|Source URL|input type=text|size=60|placeholder=FamilySearch or other URL}}}
|}

{{{end template}}}

'''Notes:'''

{{{standard input|free text|rows=8}}}

{{{standard input|summary}}}

{{{standard input|minor edit}}} {{{standard input|watch}}}

{{{standard input|save}}} {{{standard input|preview}}} {{{standard input|changes}}} {{{standard input|cancel}}}
</includeonly>
